tasks.subject: Task 1: Delete dead terminal.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the never-imported apps/web/app/(front)/terminal.tsx, which still shows the original Vercel starter's clone URL.

**Open question:** design doc offers reviving it instead of deleting; mechanical default here is delete (zero import sites).

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/terminal-removed.test.ts -> Test Files 1 passed, Tests 1 passed

Full code in the plan doc, Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/web/app/(front)/terminal.tsx", "apps/web/tests/unit/terminal-removed.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/terminal-removed.test.ts", "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

**Open question:** design doc's alternative is porting the dead file's scroll-linked animation into the live component instead of discarding it.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Settings remove-member gate - replace hardcoded index > 1 with a real isOwner/self-protection rule
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the meaningless index > 1 gate in settings.tsx with canRemoveTeamMember: only owners can remove members, owners can't be removed, nobody removes themselves.

**Note:** first of three tasks touching settings.tsx in sequence (10 -> 11 -> 15); this one is a full-file rewrite.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/permissions.test.ts -> Test Files 1 passed, Tests 5 passed

Full code in the plan doc, Task 10.

```json:metadata

```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Centralize avatar-initials logic into one helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add getInitials(name, email) to packages/ui/src/lib/utils.ts (splits on name first, falls back to email local-part) and use it everywhere an avatar derives initials from email.split(' ').

**Note:** patches the settings.tsx that Task 10 rewrote (AvatarFallback body only), plus front layout.tsx and nav-user.tsx.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/utils.test.ts tests/unit/front-layout-avatar-initials.test.tsx -> Test Files 2 passed


tasks.description:

**Open question:** real Stripe priceId/productId values are still needed before checkout works in production - this task only stops the silent-empty-string landmine.

**Verify:** pnpm --filter web test -- tests/unit/tiers.test.ts tests/unit/pricing-card-checkout.test.tsx -> Test Files 2 passed, Tests 5 passed
